# ProAthletica

> ProAthletica is a data-driven fitness equipment review platform. We analyze 47,000+ verified customer reviews and technical specifications to rank home gym gear — with no paid placements.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.athletica.page/) — Browse top-ranked fitness gear and data-driven recommendations
- [About Our Mission](https://www.athletica.page/about) — Meet the editorial team and learn our story
- [Editorial Methodology](https://www.athletica.page/methodology) — How our 100-point Athletica Lab scoring system works
- [Equipment Categories](https://www.athletica.page/categories) — Browse gear by training focus
- [Best Home Gym Equipment](https://www.athletica.page/best/best-home-gym-equipment) — Top picks roundup

## API Endpoints

- [Products API](https://www.athletica.page/api/products) — Retrieve product data
- [Recommendations API](https://www.athletica.page/api/recommendations) — AI-powered gear recommendations
- [Calculator API](https://www.athletica.page/api/calculator) — Performance calculator endpoint

## Contact

- Email: hello@athletica.page
- Pinterest: https://pinterest.com/proathletica
